title: Navigate to the 'INFO' tab from the 'EVENTS' tab
test_steps: Click on the 'INFO' tab. | Verify that the 'INFO' tab is now active.

title: Navigate to the 'COMMENTS' tab from the 'EVENTS' tab
test_steps: Click on the 'COMMENTS' tab. | Verify that the 'COMMENTS' tab is now active.

title: Click on 'MAKE YOUR PREDICTION' section
test_steps: Click on the 'MAKE YOUR PREDICTION' section. | Verify that the prediction options are displayed.

title: Select 'Osmanlispor' as the prediction
test_steps: Click on the 'Osmanlispor' prediction option. | Verify that 'Osmanlispor' is selected as the prediction.

title: Select 'Draw' as the prediction
test_steps: Click on the 'Draw' prediction option. | Verify that 'Draw' is selected as the prediction.

title: Select 'Olympiakos Piraeus' as the prediction
test_steps: Click on the 'Olympiakos Piraeus' prediction option. | Verify that 'Olympiakos Piraeus' is selected as the prediction.
expected_result: 'Olympiakos Piraeus' is selected as the prediction.

title: Click on the 'Refresh' icon in the header
test_steps: Click on the 'Refresh' icon in the header. | Verify that the content is refreshed.

title: Click on the 'Menu' icon in the header
test_steps: Click on the 'Menu' icon in the header. | Verify that the menu options are displayed.

title: Click on the 'Back' arrow in the header
test_steps: Click on the 'Back' arrow in the header. | Verify that the user is navigated back to the previous screen.
expected_result: The user is navigated back to the previous screen.
